title: FIGS Q2 2025: Revenue Growth Accelerates, Profitability Surges, Guidance Raised
text: FIGS reported Q2 2025 net revenues of $152.6 million, representing 6% YoY increase, up from 5% prior quarter. Scrubwear sales grew 8% YoY. Net income margin reached 4.7% versus 0.8% in Q2 2024. Adjusted EBITDA margin expanded to 12.9% from 9.0% in Q2 2024, demonstrating improved operational efficiency. Active customers grew 4% to 2.74 million while average order value increased 4% to $117, indicating strong pricing power and retention. Management significantly improved 2025 outlook: Revenue now projecting low-single-digit growth versus previous guidance of low-single-digit decline, meaningful reversal. Adjusted EBITDA margin increased to 8.5-9.0% from prior 7.5-8.5%. Upward revision reflects confidence in strategic initiatives gaining traction, particularly international expansion and retail presence growth.
